steps.action: Ensure Anti-Skid Switch is set to ON (UP Position), and Flaps are HALF (MIDDLE position), chocks are removed, Launch Bar is RETRACTED and Parking Brake is released

Aircraft is steered using the nosewheel steering (NWS), controlled with rudder pedals. The default NWS LOW GAIN Mode allows +/- 16 deg and is displayed as NWS on the HUD. The NWS HIGH GAIN Mode allows +/- 75 deg steering, which is useful on aircraft carriers or small spaces. You can activate it by pressing and holding the «Undesignate /Nosewheel Steer Switch» (key binding: « S ») button on your HOTAS. This steering mode is displayed as NWS HI on the HUD.
Once lined up on the runway, hold brakes and throttle up to 80 % RPM
Release brakes and set throttle fully forward to engage afterburners
When reaching approx. 150 kts, hold stick back to set an aircraft pitch of 7 degrees AoA
Once you have a positive climb, raise landing gear up before reaching 240 kts
Set ALTITUDE Switch to BARO once reaching an altitude of 3000 ft to use Barometric Altitude as a reference for your HUD.
